9:30 AM COURT CALLED TO ORDER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGEMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. JUDGEMENT IS FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION BY PLAINTIFF, M. TAPPE, OF 1114 SUTTER STREET, APT. 409, SAN FRANCISCO. DEFENDANTS RICHARD LEW AND KAREN CASTER, WILL MOVE OUT OF THE PREMISES AT 1114 SUTTER, APT. 409 BY 8-31-94, 6PM. ALL BACK RENT IS WAIVED. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPPE, M. AS TO DEFENDANT LEW, RICHARD CASTER, KAREN SUMMONS ISSUED
